An Open-Jaw Family Expedition · Summer MMXXVI

AUSTRIA
two mountain bases

Vienna · Salzburg · Zell am See · the Zillertal · Munich

IN London LHR ✈ Vienna◆ 2 alpine bases · 3 nights each◆ OUT Munich ✈ London · 30 Jul
City & Culture Heat-relief day — lake or alpine cooling Cable car / lift
01
Mon 20 JulVIENNA

Schönbrunn & Prater

Fly LHR → Wien. Ease in at the imperial summer palace — gilded halls, the Gloriette hill, and a hedge maze made for kids — then the Prater funfair and its 1897 big wheel come evening.

LHR ✈ VIEPalace + funfair
02
HEAT RELIEF
Tue 21 JulVIENNA

Museum & Danube Swim

Dinosaurs and meteorites at the Natural History Museum in the cool of the morning, then escape the city heat with an afternoon swim at the Alte Donau beaches. No car, no rush.

NHM WienDanube swim
03
Wed 22 JulSALZBURG

Fortress & Mirabell

Railjet train west to Salzburg (~2.5 hrs). Funicular up to Hohensalzburg fortress for the view, then the Mirabell gardens — the Do-Re-Mi steps. Pick up the car here.

VIE → SZGFortress + gardens
04
HEAT RELIEF
Thu 23 JulZELL AM SEE

Lake Day, Zeller See

Short drive to your first mountain base for three nights. Settle in with a pure lake day: swim, pedalo, and the flat, pram-friendly lakeshore path on the cool, clear Zeller See.

Base: 3 ntsLake swim
05
HEAT RELIEF
Fri 24 JulZELL AM SEE

Schmittenhöhe Ridge

Float up the Schmittenhöhe cable car to ~2,000 m, then walk the easy panorama ridge — thirty glaciated peaks in view with almost no climbing. Cool mountain air all day.

Cable car2,000 m air
06
HEAT RELIEF
Sat 25 JulGROSSGLOCKNER

High Alpine Road

A big-view day: drive part of the Grossglockner High Alpine Road to a viewpoint — glaciers, marmots, and hairpin drama — without committing to the whole pass with young kids.

Scenic driveHigh & cool
07
Sun 26 JulMAYRHOFEN

Into the Zillertal

Drive west (~1.5 hrs) to your second base for three nights. Easy afternoon settling into the Zillertal — village pool, gentle valley stroll, or the Zillertal steam railway.

ZAS → MHOBase: 3 nts
08
HEAT RELIEF
Mon 27 JulSCHLEGEIS

Turquoise Reservoir

Up the toll road to the Schlegeis reservoir — startling turquoise water ringed by peaks. A flat, easy shoreline walk by the dam: the gentle stand-in for the big Olpererhütte climb.

Flat lakesideAlpine lake
09
HEAT RELIEF
Tue 28 JulMAYRHOFEN

Alm Meadow & Rest

A cable-car-assisted high meadow day — the kids get the summit feeling without the slog — or a deliberate do-nothing day at the village pool. Your slow day, banked for tired legs.

Lift upHigh meadow
10
Wed 29 JulMUNICH

Drive Out, City Afternoon

Relaxed travel day: drive to Munich (~2 hrs) and return the car at the airport this evening. Afternoon in the city — the English Garden's Monopteros and river-surfers, Marienplatz, ice cream.

MHO → MUCEnglish Garden
11
Thu 30 JulDEPARTURE

Fly Home

A calm finish: short transfer from the city to Munich airport and fly back to London. No long drive on flight day — the car's already returned. One capital to another, bookended.

MUC ✈ LHRHome
11Days
5Bases only
6Cooling Days
3Capitals & cities
5·8·11Ages aboard

An extra day turns the rush into a finish: three full nights at each alpine base, then a relaxed drive to Munich with the car returned the evening before you fly. Every mountain base pairs a lake with a lift, the heat-relief days are built in, and you bookend the trip from one great city to another.

Photographs: Wikimedia Commons · For family planning use
